Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space. 1: "use client"; 2: 3: import { motion, useScroll, useTransform, useInView, animate } from "framer-motion"; 4: import { ArrowRight, BookOpen, Star, Clock, Bookmark, Play, CheckCircle2, Search, LogIn, Calculator, Atom, FlaskConical, Globe, ScrollText, Code, LineChart, TrendingUp, ChevronRight } from "lucide-react"; 5: import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from "react"; 6: import Image from "next/image"; 7: 8: // --- Custom CountUp Component --- 9: function Counter({ from, to, duration = 2 }: { from: number, to: number, duration?: number }) { 10: const ref = useRef(null); 11: const inView = useInView(ref, { once: true, margin: "-100px" }); 12: 13: useEffect(() => { 14: if (inView && ref.current) { 15: const controls = animate(from, to, { 16: duration, 17: ease: "easeOut", 18: onUpdate(value) { 19: if (ref.current) { 20: ref.current.textContent = Math.round(value).toLocaleString(); 21: } 22: }, 23: }); 24: return () => controls.stop(); 25: } 26: }, [inView, from, to, duration]); 27: 28: return {from}; 29: } 30: 31: // --- Section 1: Floating Library Data --- 32: // Clustered asymmetrically, varied sizes and rotations 33: const floatingSubjects = [ 34: // Top Left Cluster 35: { name: "Mathematics", x: "15%", y: "15%", delay: 0.1, size: "lg", rotation: -2, topics: ["Algebra", "Geometry", "Calculus"] }, 36: { name: "Statistics", x: "28%", y: "22%", delay: 0.3, size: "sm", rotation: 1, topics: ["Probability", "Data"] }, 37: 38: // Center Left Cluster 39: { name: "Literature", x: "10%", y: "45%", delay: 0.2, size: "md", rotation: 2, topics: ["Shakespeare", "Poetry"] }, 40: { name: "Philosophy", x: "22%", y: "55%", delay: 0.5, size: "sm", rotation: -1, topics: ["Ethics", "Logic"] }, 41: 42: // Bottom Left Cluster 43: { name: "Physics", x: "18%", y: "75%", delay: 0.4, size: "lg", rotation: -3, topics: ["Mechanics", "Optics"] }, 44: 45: // Top Right Cluster 46: { name: "Biology", x: "75%", y: "18%", delay: 0.3, size: "lg", rotation: 3, topics: ["Cells", "Genetics"] }, 47: { name: "Chemistry", x: "62%", y: "26%", delay: 0.6, size: "md", rotation: -1, topics: ["Organic", "Physical"] }, 48: 49: // Center Right Cluster 50: { name: "Computer Science", x: "82%", y: "48%", delay: 0.4, size: "md", rotation: -2, topics: ["Algorithms", "AI"] }, 51: 52: // Bottom Right Cluster 53: { name: "History", x: "70%", y: "70%", delay: 0.2, size: "lg", rotation: 1, topics: ["World War II", "Rome"] }, 54: { name: "Economics", x: "85%", y: "82%", delay: 0.5, size: "sm", rotation: 2, topics: ["Micro", "Macro"] }, 55: ]; 56: 57: export default function Home() { 58: const [mounted, setMounted] = useState(false); 59: useEffect(() => setMounted(true), []); 60: 61: const { scrollYProgress } = useScroll(); 62: const heroOpacity = useTransform(scrollYProgress, [0, 0.2], [1, 0]); 63: const heroY = useTransform(scrollYProgress, [0, 0.2], [0, -100]); 64: const gridOpacity = useTransform(scrollYProgress, [0.1, 0.25], [0, 1]); 65: const gridY = useTransform(scrollYProgress, [0.1, 0.25], [50, 0]); 66: 67: return ( 68:
